repairs.typography_delta: Replace the inherited Run 2.5 title/body scale with stronger editorial contrast, shorter subtitles, and marginal trace notes.
repairs.spacing_delta: Use Run 2.5 as the negative baseline: remove repeated same-position headings and give each slide role a distinct focal/support/provenance zone.
repairs.composition_delta: Keep all major text and proof objects native editable PPT shapes while reducing report-like label density.
repairs.theme_delta: Pair graphite text with light editorial canvas and one vivid proof color; avoid forest-green and source-brand color mimicry.
repairs.qa_probe: In the contact sheet, headline hierarchy must be visibly different from Run 2.5 before zooming.

repairs.typography_delta: Use smaller support labels than Run 2.5 and move implementation detail into side rails or trace strips.
repairs.spacing_delta: Make spacing tokens visible: large outer editorial margins, wider gutters around focal proof objects, and tighter internal mini-preview spacing.
repairs.composition_delta: Use native focal/support/provenance zones instead of repeated Run 2.5 panel placement.
repairs.theme_delta: Let whitespace carry the premium feel; do not use dark forest-green panels or source-brand color mimicry as the primary visual rhythm.
repairs.qa_probe: The contact sheet should show distinct slide-role spacing rhythms rather than repeated templates.

repairs.typography_delta: Give the climax the largest and shortest headline, with secondary detail pushed into a small proof strip.
repairs.spacing_delta: Allocate the largest visual field to one native editorial proof spread, not to repeated Run 2.5 hero-object blocks.
repairs.composition_delta: Rebuild slide 05 as a before/after or workflow-to-output editorial spread using native PPT shapes; do not reuse the Run 2.5/2.6 dark hero-object layout.
repairs.theme_delta: Use light canvas plus graphite and vivid proof color; avoid the inherited forest-green climax and source-brand mimicry.
native_ppt_requirements: secondary details in native side rail
repairs.qa_probe: Slide 05 must be the most visibly changed full-arm slide in the contact sheet and full-skill-series image.

repairs.typography_delta: Use editorial type contrast to carry theme change instead of relying on dark slide backgrounds.
repairs.spacing_delta: Use whitespace and graphite rails as the main system, not Run 2.5 dark/light alternation.
repairs.composition_delta: Build a light-first product editorial surface with native material panels for mini-previews and proof objects.
repairs.theme_delta: Replace Run 2.5 forest-green/off-white dominance with light editorial canvas, graphite structure, cool material surfaces, and one vivid proof color; forbid source-brand mimicry.
repairs.qa_probe: The contact sheet and full-skill-series image must show Run 2.6R as a different visual system after Run 2.6.

repairs.typography_delta: Use preview labels as small native captions, not explanatory paragraphs.
repairs.spacing_delta: Use tight internal preview spacing and generous external whitespace to make previews feel intentional.
repairs.composition_delta: Replace placeholder screens with editable native slide-surface modules that show selected states, proof routes, and handoff gates.
repairs.theme_delta: Use cool material preview surfaces without reverting to forest-green rhythm or copying Figma, Apple, Google, Stripe, Duarte, SlideModel, or other source-brand identity.
repairs.qa_probe: Mini-previews should read as product surfaces in the contact sheet, not placeholder rectangles.
